title: Acquisition of Greenvale Energy Ltd
background: Hartwell & Co. is acting for Meridian Infrastructure Partners (the Buyer) in the proposed acquisition of Greenvale Energy Ltd (the Target), a mid-size renewable energy developer. The Target is represented by the opposing counsel (you). Heads of Terms have been signed. The transaction value is approximately £45m.
agreed_points: Enterprise value of £45m (subject to working capital adjustment)
Seller to provide standard title warranties

contested_points.notes: Market norm for this deal type is typically 30–50%

contested_points.buyer_position: 7 years for tax warranties, 3 years for general warranties

contested_points.seller_position: 15% of EV (£6.75m) deferred subject to EBITDA targets over 3 years
contested_points.notes: Seller has a key employee retention concern underlying this ask
Seller's founder wants to start a new venture

contested_points.buyer_position: £4m retention held in escrow for 24 months
contested_points.seller_position: No retention — seller needs proceeds to repay investor loans at completion
contested_points.notes: Buyer's concern is a pending planning permission dispute on one of the wind farm sites
